subcodes.first_line: My spirit and my soul be a sacrifice unto thee! The blessed leaf that was adorned with the mention of the Beloved hath brought solace unto this heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی و نفسی لک الفداء ورقه مبارکه که مطرز بذکر محبوب بود سبب جمعیت این قلب
subcodes.subjects: @the human soul, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
